'''Cerean pack animals''' were domesticated animals indigenous to [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]. They were used to pull Cerean [[cart]]s.<ref name="SW986">[[Star Wars (1998) 6|''Star Wars'' (1998) 6]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 1|''Star Wars'' (1998) 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars (1998) 6|''Star Wars'' (1998) 6]]
